_comment: Tracked in-repo mirror of the MA queue row appended to the external apex_governance/MISSING_SECRETS.queue.json during ANIM-11. The external file is outside the code-artifacts git tree; this in-repo audit satisfies the SPEC DoD durability claim (per ANIM-09 round-1 fix pattern).

location_checked: apex_governance/codex_runs/AGEN-architecture-agent-post-migration/ (5 review transcripts; WKFL+PRMPT+TEST+SCRPT inline — used for ANIM-11 restore — but NO SPEC)
AGENT_BUILD_SYSTEM/05_ARCHITECTURE_AGENT/ live path (only HANDOVER+PROJECT_INSTRUCTIONS before ANIM-11)
row.symptom: AGEN-SPEC-architecture-integration-v1.md is not inline in any of the 28 architecture codex transcripts across 7 subdirectories. ANIM-11 verbatim recovery therefore restored 4 of 5 architecture artifacts (WKFL+PRMPT+TEST+SCRPT) and left SPEC unrecovered.
row.impact: Architecture agent restored without an integration spec. Cert covers correctness of 4 restored bytes, not full agent R15 closure. Downstream Architecture runtime can proceed using WKFL+PRMPT+TEST+SCRPT (the deployable artifacts); SPEC is a doc-control gap.
row.resolution_required: Operator picks: (a) locate from prompt registry / X clone snapshots predating May deletion; (b) draft fresh under separate ANIM phase reviewed adversarially against restored WKFL/PRMPT/TEST/SCRPT; (c) declare out-of-scope.
